meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Build a Portfolio Without Experience
content.seo_description: Stop waiting for clients. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to execute high-impact freelance pitching and build your portfolio from scratch today.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth. You solve it by building hyper-specific, high-value prototypes that solve a prospect's actual pain point. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can generate a professional-grade demo in hours, not weeks, and pitch it as a solution.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio page is the graveyard of many promising freelance careers. You are stuck in the loop of needing work to get experience, but needing experience to get work. Clients don't care about your resume; they care about their bottom line. The secret isn't a gallery of fake projects; it's a single, laser-focused prototype that solves a specific business problem.

By treating your pitch as an engineering task, you shift the dynamic from 'please hire me' to 'here is how I fix your revenue problem.' We will use Antigravity to architect the backbone and Claude Code to polish the logic, turning a cold pitch into a high-conversion demonstration of your technical authority.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Pain Point
steps.description: Identify a specific niche where you can provide immediate value. Research a company's public tech stack and find a workflow bottleneck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze a hypothetical e-commerce store losing conversions at checkout. Design a micro-service architecture that implements a real-time abandoned cart recovery trigger.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'research target company tech stack and identify one bottleneck'

steps.title: Scaffold the Prototype Architecture
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the structural code. Focus on clean, modular architecture that demonstrates senior-level patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate for a Node.js microservice using TypeScript, including Zod validation and a clean repository pattern for database interactions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold project structure following clean architecture principles'

steps.title: Implement the Core Business Logic
steps.description: Inject the specific logic that solves the identified pain point. Keep it lean and focused on the 'wow' factor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic for a webhook-based cart recovery service that integrates with Stripe and SendGrid APIs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement logic for webhook handler and email trigger'

steps.title: Automate Testing and Quality Assurance
steps.description: Professionalism is defined by testing. Ensure your code is robust before it ever reaches a client's eyes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Jest test suite for the cart recovery service, covering edge cases like API timeouts and invalid webhook payloads.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests and run them to ensure 90% coverage'

steps.title: Package the Pitch Asset
steps.description: Create a README and a video summary that frames your code as a business solution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a compelling README for a freelance pitch that explains the business value of this microservice, not just the technical implementation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a professional README.md that highlights business ROI'

pro_tips: Never send a link to a repo; send a Loom video of the code working in a production-like environment.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code into 'clean code' standards before showing it; clients judge your architecture, not just your features.
Target 'micro-problems'—the smaller the scope, the easier it is to demonstrate mastery.
Always include a 'next steps' roadmap in your pitch to show you think like a consultant, not just a coder.
Use Antigravity to simulate load testing on your demo to prove it is production-ready.
content.next_steps: After completing your prototype, create a 60-second video walkthrough and send it directly to the CTO or Product Lead of your target company.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect client to find you. Become the engineer they can't afford to ignore by shipping solutions that matter. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
